description: Join our first ever AUM chanting circle in person or remotely as we beta test the app.  We are looking for chanters to join our beta test group in order to qualify for the Google Play app store.  To join, please follow the link and join the group, and follow instructions for download the app for testing.  If you cannot join the beta test group, you can still come in person to Sanctuary Siargao where we will have the in person circle, or join remotely by coming back to this site and joining the room at the specified time.  Thanks for your help beta testing so we can launch on Google Play!

Join our weekly AUM chanting circle in person or remotely as we beta test the app.  We are looking for chanters to join our beta test group in order to qualify for the Google Play app store.  To join, please follow the link and join the group, and follow instructions for download the app for testing.  If you cannot join the beta test group, you can still come in person to Sanctuary Siargao where we will have the in person circle, or join remotely by coming back to this site and joining the room at the specified time.  Thanks for your help beta testing so we can launch on Google Play!
